title: Cucumber Fabric
description: A semi-finished fork of Cucumber Library using Porting Lib.
body:
# Cucumber Library, Fabricated.
Cucumber Library Fabric is a fork of Cucumber Lib's 1.21.1 version to the Fabric ecosystem using Porting Lib.
It was originally meant for use in other mods made by Blake which never came, so this is a mod currently not used for anything that we know of. 
This is missing some parts of the library (most notably scythes).
This is / was a first attempt to port a mod, with major help from AlphaMode.

This should allow people who see fit, port over mods such as Mystical Agriculture easier.
There has been no API changes except for things that are unfinished. 
You should be able to import this project via Modrinth's Maven.

**DO NOT USE THIS MOD IN KILT!**
If you want to use mystical Agriculture in Kilt, you should be using normal Cucumberlib. This port is **UNFINISHED**.

We are not affiliated with the original creator in any way, this fork was made following license terms (MIT) and the original creator did not have any say in the porting.
